introSection: Mad Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by American manufacturer Allan Herschell Company previously located at Seaburn Fun Park in Sunderland, Tyne & Wear, England, United Kingdom.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The origin of this coaster is a bit of a mystery, being unknown. The coaster was sold to John H. Rundle after its closure.

fullText:
Mad Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by American manufacturer Allan Herschell Company previously located at Seaburn Fun Park in Sunderland, Tyne & Wear, England, United Kingdom.

The origin of this coaster is a bit of a mystery, being unknown. The coaster was sold to John H. Rundle after its closure.
